packageType.description: The package "type" or package "protocol" such as maven, npm, nuget, gem, pypi, etc

packageNamespace.description: Some name prefix such as a Maven groupId, a Docker image owner, a GitHub user or organization. Optional and type-specific.

subpath.description: Extra subpath within a package, relative to the package root

qualifiers.description: Extra qualifying data for a package such as an OS, architecture, a distro, etc

purl.description: The package url as per the https://github.com/package-url/purl-spec spec
